tldr: Replace Agora's audio/video SDK with Daily by recreating rooms, swapping client SDKs, and reissuing meeting tokens.
why_switch: Simpler room-based abstraction vs Agora's channels and tokens
WebRTC-first stack with predictable browser behaviour
Recording and live streaming exposed via REST
Cleaner pricing with public subscription tiers
Strong React/React Native and JS SDKs
what_to_export: List of active channels/rooms and their participants
Recording storage paths and retention policy
Any custom signaling or RTM messages
Quality and bandwidth metrics for sizing
export_method: Most state is ephemeral session data. Export your room/channel inventory from your own database, plus any recordings stored on Agora to your own storage before cancellation. If you use Agora RTM for chat alongside RTC, plan that data migration separately.
import_method: Create a Daily account, install the daily-js or daily-react SDK on clients, and switch your token issuance to Daily's REST API. Recreate rooms via API as users join, or pre-create them for known sessions. Run both providers behind a feature flag and cut traffic over per cohort.

concept_mapping.note: Confirm output formats match your CDN

gotchas: Platform coverage differs; check Unity/Flutter parity if you need them
Recording file formats and storage hooks differ
Token TTL and permission model is not identical
Bitrate and codec defaults can change perceived quality
Custom signaling on Agora RTM needs a replacement design

email.subject: Cancelling Agora account
email.body:
Hi Agora team,

We're migrating our real-time video workload to Daily. Please confirm the cancellation date and any final billing for our account.

Thanks.
